1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to those intersecting Kristiansand municipality

5.description: get buildings in Kristiansand municipality (filter by kommunenummer)

6.description: find nearest 200-year storm-surge polygon for each building

7.description: keep buildings within 50 m of a 200-year storm-surge polygon

8.description: attach county to filtered buildings by spatial intersection with fylke

9.description: sort buildings by ascending distance to storm-surge

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, objtype, lokalid, oppdateringsdato, omrade, sikkerhetsklasseflom
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

1.description: find Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer using name lookup

2.description: select buildings in Kristiansand by kommunenummer, returning objid, bygningid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, representasjonspunkt geometry

3.description: select 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) with objid and omrade geometry

4.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to those intersecting the municipality geometry

5.description: find nearest storm-surge polygon to each building (returns distance in meters)

7.description: sort buildings by ascending distance and by building id as tie-breaker (distance primary)

9.description: get fylke polygon and fylkesnavn to determine county containing the municipality

10.description: find which fylke contains the municipality geometry (attach fylke attributes to municipality)

replan_trigger.error: Step 3 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

  ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin, ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin, ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax, ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax,

WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt,25833) AS representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204' AND representasjonspunkt IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, lokalid, oppdateringsdato, sikkerhetsklasseflom, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204')) ;
